languages.text: Кто-то сбрасывает вниз изрезанные одеяния. Многие пропитаны багровыми пятнами.

languages.text: Somebody is throwing down slashed pieces of clothing. Many are covered in scarlet stains.
languages.original_text: Кто-то сбрасывает вниз изрезанные одеяния. Многие пропитаны багровыми пятнами.

languages.text: Jemand wirft zerfetzte Kleidungsstücke herunter. Viele sind mit scharlachroten Flecken übersät.
languages.original_text: Somebody is throwing down slashed pieces of clothing. Many are covered in scarlet stains.

languages.text: Quelqu'un jette des vêtements tailladés. Beaucoup sont couverts de taches écarlates.
languages.original_text: Somebody is throwing down slashed pieces of clothing. Many are covered in scarlet stains.

languages.text: 有人扔下被割破的衣服。许多衣服上都沾满了猩红的污渍。
languages.original_text: Somebody is throwing down slashed pieces of clothing. Many are covered in scarlet stains.

languages.text: Alguien arroja al suelo piezas de ropa acuchilladas. Muchas están cubiertas de manchas escarlata.
languages.original_text: Somebody is throwing down slashed pieces of clothing. Many are covered in scarlet stains.

languages.text: 誰かが切り裂かれた衣服の切れ端を投げ捨てている。多くは緋色の染みに覆われている。
languages.original_text: Somebody is throwing down slashed pieces of clothing. Many are covered in scarlet stains.

languages.text: Birileri yere kesilmiş giysi parçaları atıyor. Birçoğu kırmızı lekelerle kaplı.
languages.original_text: Somebody is throwing down slashed pieces of clothing. Many are covered in scarlet stains.
